feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1826 201 1625 79
TR 1678 172 1506 64

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Farming Simulator 20
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺80,00 [₺80,00 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺80,00

In-App Purchases

  • 1'000'000 Coins：₺149,99
  • 200'000 Coins：₺49,99
  • 500'000 Coins：₺99,99

Application Description

Step into the exciting world of farming with Farming Simulator 20! Harvest many different crops, tend to your livestock of pigs, cows, and sheep, and now ride your own horses, letting you explore the vast land around your farm in a brand-new way. Sell your products in a dynamic market to earn money which you can invest in additional machinery and the expansion of your farm. In Farming Simulator 20 you take control of over 100 vehicles and tools faithfully recreated from leading brands in the industry. For the first time on mobile platforms this includes John Deere, the largest agriculture machinery company in the world. Drive other famous farming brands such as Case IH, New Holland, Challenger, Fendt, Massey Ferguson, Valtra, Krone, Deutz-Fahr and many more. Farming Simulator 20 features a new North American environment in which to develop and expand your farm. Enjoy many exciting farming activities, including new machinery and crops with cotton and oats. Features of Farming Simulator 20 include: • Use over 100 realistic vehicles and tools from some of the biggest agriculture machine makers • Plant and harvest different crops: Wheat, barley, oat, canola, sunflowers, soybean, corn, potatoes, sugar beet and cotton • Feed your cows and sheep to produce and sell milk and wool • Take care of horses and ride on them to freely explore the world around your farm • New 3D graphics show even more detail on your machinery and the Northern American environment • Cockpit view lets you drive in your vehicles in an even more realistic way than before

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Onyx Magic
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Onyx Print：₺4.999,99 → ₺2.499,99 [₺2.499,99 ~ ₺4.999,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺3.499,99

In-App Purchases

  • Onyx Print：₺2.499,99
  • 100 Onyx Credits：₺999,99

Application Description

Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data. Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera. For example: — Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet. — Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal. — Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought. — Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal. — Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye. — Change the time on a photo of a clock. — Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier. ...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it. Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice. * Variable Delayed Input Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken. * Cutting Edge Technology Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely. * Create Unlimited Effects Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took. * Your Integrations. Their Camera The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket. * Invisible, Advanced Technology As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous. * Third Party Integrations Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including: — Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input — Native voice input — Native clock swipe input — WebFX's Wrist Gestures — WikiTest — PeekSmith — Bridge ...and any compatible third-party app. # Introducing: Onyx Print Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world. # Produce Physical Photographs Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending. # Dynamic Prompting Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx. Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match. # Use Your Own Photos You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal. # Works With Other Apps Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it. Onyx Print is an in-app purchase within Onyx, and currently supports the Instax mini Link+, with plans for additional printers in the future. Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits. Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

entry.title: This War of Mine
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺799,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺799,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

In-App Purchases

  • The Little Ones：₺99,99

Application Description

"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK "This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps "I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better. This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? Key Features: • Inspired by real-life events • Control your survivors and manage your shelter • Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive • Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience • Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game • Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands. • Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine • Protect innocent children • Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need • Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: LaxtTime - Remember Last Time
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Premium Lifetime：₺999,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺999,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Premium Annual：₺349,99
  • Premium Monthly：₺39,99
  • Premium Lifetime-Early Bird：₺999,99
  • Premium Lifetime：₺399,99

Application Description

LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life. If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them. #For example, you can record The last time you cleaned the kitchen The last time you meditated The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping... LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set. It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters. #Features [Record Last Occurrence] LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute. If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to. [Repeat Reminders] LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets. You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time. Simple design, appropriate reminders. [Schedule Management] LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule. [Data Statistics] LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information. At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life. [Flexible Recording] LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values. You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts. You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]... [Clean UI] LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need. [Rich Personalization] LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records. At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience. [Practical Widgets] Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays. [Heat Map] Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns. [Membership Instructions] Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features. --- After confirming the purchase and payment, your iTunes account will automatically renew the subscription. The Apple iTunes account will charge within 24 hours before the expiration date. Once the payment is successful, the subscription period will extend by one subscription period. To cancel the renewal, please manually turn off the auto-renewal feature in the iTunes/AppleID settings at least 24 hours before the current subscription period ends. During the trial period, if the iTunes account does not cancel the subscription, it will automatically start the subscription and charge at the end of the trial period. Any unused trial period will be forfeited after purchasing the subscription. This service allows you to choose whether to cancel; if you choose not to cancel, the renewal service for the next billing period will start automatically. [Privacy policy] (a) https://merciful-sugar-3e6.notion.site/Laxt-Time-Privacy-7b76083d34d545abb8a59efe25c001f7 (b) https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ [Terms of service] (a) https://merciful-sugar-3e6.notion.site/Terms-of-service-08c6aecd3d5b4e6f8c91adb04f770826?pvs=74

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Countdown App
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺29,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Countdown 2.0 Monthly：₺99,99
  • Countdown 2.0 Lifetime：₺249,99

Application Description

Your countdown awaits. Inspired by the horror movie Countdown, this app will reveal exactly how much time you have left. By receiving, opening the file package, and/or using Countdown ("Software") containing this software, you agree that this End User License Agreement (EULA) is a legally binding and valid contract and agree to be bound by it. You agree to abide by the intellectual property laws and all of the terms and conditions of this Agreement. The user shall accept the terms of his or her fate. Any attempt to use information derived from Countdown to alter the user’s fate will result in a breach of this agreement. - HOME EXPERIENCE Uncover the presence of Ozhin within your home and prepare yourself for an eerie encounter as supernatural occurrences come to life. This feature uses HomeKit to interact with your home devices and deliver an immersive horror experience. Ozhin will make its presence felt through rapid and random flashing of lights, creating an unsettling atmosphere that will heighten the tension. This feature is only available to users with HomeKit accessories. Important Warning: This experience includes flashing lights which may not be suitable for individuals with epilepsy or those sensitive to intense light patterns. If you have epilepsy, are prone to seizures, or have sensitivity to flashing lights, please exercise caution or refrain from using this feature to avoid any potential risks. - LIVE CHAT Connect with other users in real time and experience the countdowns together. Watch as each person’s countdown ticks down. This social feature allows you to chat and discuss the app's events while living through the terror together. - NEW: DEATH REASON Uncover the reason for your death in this chilling new feature. Explore various dark and mysterious causes behind your inevitable fate, adding a layer of depth and narrative to your Countdown experience. What will your fate be? Discover the truth behind your demise with each new countdown. - NEW: NOTIFICATIONS Ozhin may now tease you with notifications, randomly changing the course of your fate. The tension is never predictable. At any moment, Ozhin could alter your countdown, adding new twists to your fate or delivering unnerving clues about what’s to come. Stay alert, as Ozhin is always watching and can change the outcome when you least expect it. - Subscriptions - The Countdown app offers both a lifetime offer and a monthly subscription to unlock all premium features, enhanced scares and removes interruptions. These subscriptions ensure that you receive the most intense and immersive Countdown experience. Subscription Terms: - Lifetime Offer: One-time payment for full access to all current and future features in Countdown 2.0, including all premium content, increased scares, and removal of ads. - Monthly Subscription: Recurring payment to unlock all features and benefits of Countdown 2.0, with a monthly renewal. Disclaimer: This app is for entertainment purposes. The results should not be taken seriously. The experience is designed to heighten suspense and deliver thrilling scares. Please ensure you’re comfortable with the content before use, especially the flashing lights and sounds, which are intended to create a heightened sense of horror.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: LumaFusion
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺1.299,99 → ₺999,99 [₺999,99 ~ ₺1.299,99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Multicam Studio：₺999,99 → ₺699,99 [₺699,99 ~ ₺999,99]
  • FCPXML Export：₺999,99 → ₺699,99 [₺699,99 ~ ₺999,99]
  • Speed Ramping & Keyframing：₺999,99 → ₺699,99 [₺699,99 ~ ₺999,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺999,99

In-App Purchases

  • Creator Pass Monthly：₺249,99
  • Creator Pass Yearly：₺1.999,99
  • Multicam Studio：₺699,99
  • FCPXML Export：₺699,99
  • Speed Ramping & Keyframing：₺699,99
  • CoreMelt PaintX Plug-In：₺999,99

Application Description

LumaFusion: The Ultimate Storytelling Experience for Video Editing Welcome to the App Store’s “App of the Year” for 2021 and the recipient of the Editors’ Choice Award! The gold standard for storytellers worldwide. Offering a fluid, intuitive, touch-screen editing experience. PROFESSIONAL EDITING MADE EASY • Six video/audio or graphic tracks: Create multiple layer edits with smooth handling of 4K ProRes and HDR media. • Six Additional audio tracks: Build your soundscape. • The ultimate Timeline: Fluent editing using the world’s most flexible track-based AND magnetic timeline. • Loads of transitions: Keep your story moving. • External Monitor Preview: View on a big screen. • Markers, tags and notes: Stay organized. • Voiceover: Record VO while playing your movie. LAYERED EFFECTS AND COLOR CORRECTION • Green screen, luma, and chroma keys: For creative compositing. • Lock & Load Video Stabilizer: Steady your footage. • Powerful color correction: Create your own look. • Video Waveform, vector and histogram scopes. • LUTs: Import and apply multiple .cube or .3dl LUTs. • Unlimited keyframes: Animate effects with precision. • Customizable text and effect presets: Save and share your favorite animations and looks. • Grids and Guides: Precisely align elements with Title-Safe, Action-Safe and horizon line. ADVANCED AUDIO CONTROL • Graphic EQ, Parametric EQ and Voice Isolation: Fine-tune audio. • Keyframe audio levels, panning, and EQ: Craft seamless mixes. • Stereo and Dual-mono audio support: For interviews with multiple mics on one clip. • Audio Ducking: Balance your music and dialogue. • Third-party audio plugins: Enhance your sound. CREATIVE TITLES AND MULTILAYER TEXT • Multilayer titles: Combine shapes, images, and text into your graphic. • Customizable fonts, colors, borders, and shadows: Design eye-catching titles. • Import custom fonts: Strengthen your brand. • Save and share title presets: Perfect for collaboration. PROJECT FLEXIBILITY AND MEDIA LIBRARY • Aspect ratios for all uses: From widescreen cinema to social media. • Frame rates from 18fps to 240fps: Flexibility for any workflow. • Edit from Photos, Frame.io, and directly from USB-C drives: Access your content anywhere. • Import media from cloud storage: Wherever you store it. SHARE YOUR MASTERPIECES • Control resolution, quality, and format: • Share movies to social media, local storage or cloud storage. • Edit on multiple devices: Seamlessly transfer projects. ENHANCED FEATURES (purchase individually, or get them ALL as part of the Creator Pass subscription - see below) • Speed Ramping and Enhanced Keyframing - Create speed ramps, Bézier curves, and easing with this one-of-a-kind, easy to use feature. • XML Export: Send your project to Final Cut Pro for Mac • Multicam Studio: Synchronize 6 cameras or audio and tap to switch angles CREATOR PASS SUBSCRIPTION • Get full access to Storyblocks for LumaFusion: Millions of High-quality royalty-free music, SFX, and videos, PLUS get ALL the Enhanced Features above. EXCEPTIONAL FREE SUPPORT • Online tutorials: www.youtube.com/@LumaTouch • Reference Guide: luma-touch.com/lumafusion-reference-guide • Support: luma-touch.com/support
